question.text: Industry analysis helps research analysts understand:

answer.text: Only the technical chart patterns of sector indices
How the industry may react to external market events and whether pricing power exists
Only the regulatory compliance of companies
Only the historical stock returns of sector ETFs

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Industry landscaping helps understand how the industry may react to external events. In low-competition industries, companies can pass on input cost increases. In high competition, pricing pressure reduces profits. **The Trap:** Industry analysis is fundamentally about understanding competitive dynamics and pricing power, not charts, compliance, or past returns. **Cross-Exam Context:** Industry reaction analysis tested in NISM Series XV Chapter 6. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When commodity prices spike, check which industries can pass costs through (low competition) vs which absorb the hit (high competition).
